CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups (soft credit). Do not edit manually. Sums the Amount of all won Opportunities where this Contact received a soft credit. Uses the Won Opportunities for Soft Credit filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total soft credit amount across all won Opportunities where this Contact is credited as a related donor (not the primary donor).
CustomField.label: Soft Credit Total
